title: Production of Principal Agricultural Commodities, Iran, 1950-1958 (World Bank, 1960)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Original document is a 1960 scanned World Bank report (data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf) with a poor-quality OCR text layer (garbled digits in places). Every value in this file was verified by rendering the exact source page (Table 5, page 40) to a high-resolution PNG (pdftoppm -r 200) and visually reading the table directly from the image, cross-checked against the raw pdftotext extraction to catch transcription slips. One OCR error was caught and corrected this way (a 'Wool' row label had been misread as '4o1' in the raw text layer; the underlying numbers were unaffected). No value was interpolated, estimated, or fabricated -- blank cells in the source table are left blank here.
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1960_current_economic_position_and_prospects.pdf — Table 5, page 40. This is the earliest granular Iran economic data in the entire project, filling the pre-1960 gap that WDI/FAOSTAT/most bulk sources don't cover. Part of a systematic effort to extract Pahlavi-era (esp. 1941-1960) data from primary-source PDFs already in data/raw/.
